The '''Hortek''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of predatory [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] that were covered with bony plates and had long necks and large unblinking eyes. They were among the few predatory races to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. They were moderately [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]], a skill that they developed to predict the actions of their prey. They were also known for their impatience, a trait associated with secretions from a gland called the pedrokk. Many Hortek sympathized with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The skills of Hortek interrogators were a prized asset of the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]].

[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]], an intelligence officer in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], was a member of this species.
